GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Why this Minenssey mask is a real force of nature for your skin", "Australian beauty brand Minenssey has mastered the nature-meets-science philosophy of high-performance and active skincare. The brand subscribes to a holistic approach to skin health, combining active botanicals and scientifically backed formulations to produce innovative and inspired skin-loving products. Minenssey's philosophies of natural beauty are perfectly encapsulated by Australian model Gabriella Brooks, as she lounges at home on a slow summer day. Surrounded by stunning Australian landscape, nestled in a reading nook at home or taking care of her skin, this local beauty knows that self-care can be low key. She takes moments of time for stillness and for quiet, whenever she can. Like Minenssey, Brooks embraces nature beautifully. Her radiant, healthy skin comes courtesy of Minenssey's new Nutritious Skin Treatment Mask, rich in Australian native botanicals, like kangaroo paw, finger lime and lemon and aniseed myrtle. These genius local ingredients are packed with potent antioxidants and equipped with incomparable healing and skin-strengthening powers. Finger lime boasts powerful, natural alpha hydroxy acids and vitamin C to make skin glow. The serum-soaked sheet mask is also infused with pre- and probiotics to balance the skin microbiome, hyaluronic acid to boost hydration and niacinamide to even skin tone and texture. Brooks uses the 15-20 minutes of masking time as space for self-reflection. You can massage in left over serum from the mask to the neck and backs of hands for a glow-boosting treatment beyond the face."
